description: Legal deed, draft, regarding the estate of Avraham ha-Levi the teacher b. Yosef b. ʿAnan, which had been deposited by the Beit Din with ʿEli b. Efrayim b. ʿEli al-Tinnīsī. Mentions Yehuda b. Meshullam b. Zekharya the scribe b. ʿAnan and Jāliyya bt. Zekharya the scribe b. ʿAnan. The traces of writing between the lines and in the margins appear to be additions to the text and, perhaps, traces of an earlier text. On Yosef b. ʿAnan, a scribe whose copy of a codex of ketuvim still survives in Cairo, see Meital in JQR 2020. (Information from Goitein's index cards). Verso contains rhymed Hebrew verses.
description_he: טיוטת שטר משפטי בנוגע לעיזבון אברהם הלוי המלמד ב' יוסף ב' ענן, שהופקד על ידי בית הדין אצל עלי ב' אפרים ב' עלי אל-תיניסי. גב: פסוקים עבריים מחורזים.
